research.summary: Mona Schirmer, Metod Jazbec, Alexander Timans et al. — Despite alignment training, LLMs remain prone to generating unsafe outputs at deployment time. Monitoring outputs online and raising an alarm when safety can no longer be assumed is therefore critical.

labs.title: Google DeepMind and A24 announce first-of-its-kind research partnership
labs.summary: Today, Google DeepMind and A24 are announcing a first-of-its-kind partnership focused on research. This partnership creates a deep research and development collaboration between A24 and Google DeepMind spanning multiple projects over time. This hands-on collaboration provides Google DeepMind with invaluable feedback and guidance from leading artists.

labs.title: Expanding our Heat Resilience data to 50+ global cities
labs.summary: This dataset is being made accessible through a new high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App. This dataset is open and accessible through our new, high-resolution Heat Resilience Earth Engine App . This platform provides high-resolution rooftop albedo (reflectivity) data to empower proactive municipal planning.

labs.title: Start building with Nano Banana 2 Lite and Gemini Omni Flash
labs.summary: We’re making it easier to experiment and scale your ideas with Nano Banana 2 Lite, our fastest, most cost-efficient Gemini Image model, and Gemini Omni Flash for high-quality video generation and conversational editing. Today, Gemini Omni Flash (gemini-omni-flash-preview) is rolling to developers via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio, natively supporting high-quality video generation and conversational editing…

labs.title: Introducing TabFM: A zero-shot foundation model for tabular data
labs.summary: We introduce TabFM, a new foundation model for tabular data to simplify classification and regression workflows. Today, we introduce TabFM, a foundation model designed specifically for tabular data classification and regression. By framing tabular prediction as an ICL problem, TabFM eliminates the need for manual model training, hyperparameter tuning , and complex feature engineering.

labs.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
labs.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

labs.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
labs.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

labs.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
labs.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

labs.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
labs.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

labs.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
labs.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

labs.title: Accelerating Gemini Nano models on Pixel with frozen Multi-Token Prediction
labs.summary: Instead of training a separate small language model to draft tokens, we append a lightweight Transformer head, the MTP head, to the final layers of the main model. Gemini Nano token generation impact of MTP vs. app-specific standalone tuned drafter across various Pixel 9 applications. Compared to Pixel 9 and Pixel 10 phones prior to MTP update.

labs.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
labs.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

startups.title: Smart glasses maker Even Realities hits $1B valuation with $150M funding led by Meituan, Tencent
startups.summary: Even’s earlier backers are mostly high-profile China names including Sequoia China. Even was started by ex-Apple engineers in 2023. The startup moved quickly, launching its first product, Even G1 , in 2024 as what Wang calls the lightest waveguide smart glasses then on the market.

startups.title: This humanoid robotics company is going public, but its CEO isn’t promising a robot in your home anytime soon
startups.summary: Last week, AI2 Robotics, a Shenzhen-based startup that makes wheeled humanoid robots, raised roughly $735 million at a nearly $3 billion valuation. By comparison, Peggy Johnson, CEO of Agility Robotics, is surprisingly measured. Based in Salem, Oregon, the company makes bipedal humanoid robots designed to work in warehouses and factories.

startups.title: Uber’s European expansion plans may have hit a speed bump
startups.summary: Back in February, Uber announced ambitious plans to launch in seven new European markets in 2026 — but now the Financial Times reports that five of those launches are on hold. Country launches that have been paused include Austria, Norway, and Greece. Another likely factor in the decision: Uber’s continuing efforts to acquire Delivery Hero, a European company that rejected Uber’s 10 billion euro takeover bid in May.

startups.title: Trump memecoin investors lost $3.8 billion, analysis finds
startups.summary: Nearly 1 million people have lost a total of $3.8 billion after buying President Donald Trump’s $TRUMP memecoin, according to cryptocurrency analytics firm Nansen. That represents around two out of three $TRUMP buyers. Trump announced the memecoin three days before his inauguration in 2025.

startups.title: Amazon will stop accepting new customers for Mechanical Turk
startups.summary: These may be the last days of Amazon’s Mechanical Turk. An announcement on the Mechanical Turk website says that on July 30, 2026, the crowdsourcing service will close to new customers. Over time, the relationship between Mechanical Turk and AI models grew even more complicated.

startups.title: 5 desk gadgets that can make your workday better
startups.summary: The right desk gadgets can help you reduce clutter, stay focused, and add a little extra convenience to your day. At just $13, the desktop vacuum is a great way to keep your desk clean as you work. The Govee Glide Hexa Light Panels are a simple and fun way to add some personality to your work desk setup without taking up any actual desk space.

startups.title: What is Bending Spoons? The little-known AOL and Vimeo owner that’s now public
startups.summary: This approach was long orthogonal to VC, and Bending Spoons remained bootstrapped for years. While Bending Spoons acquired several companies between 2014 and 2021, including the AI-powered photo enhancer Remini, its most notable acquisitions happened more recently. In November 2024, Bending Spoons announced it would spend $233 million on an all-cash take-private deal to acquire video platform Brightcove.

startups.title: Almost 90 new unicorns have been minted so far this year — here they are
startups.summary: It last raised a $195 million Series A and has raised $217 million in funding to date. It last raised a $100 million Series D. Founded in 2024, it last raised a $255 million Series A.

startups.title: New Google commercial imagines a Declaration of Independence written with help from AI
startups.summary: Two hundred and fifty years after the signing of the Declaration of Independence, a new commercial from Google asks : What if the Founding Fathers had access to Google Workspace? Edits are suggested in Google Docs, a meeting gets scheduled in Google Calendar and conducted remotely via Google Meet (with every single attendee apparently turning their camera off?), then the whole thing is finalized with e-signatures;…

startups.title: Midjourney wants Hollywood studios to reveal the details of their AI usage
startups.summary: As part of an ongoing legal dispute with three Hollywood studios, AI startup Midjourney is seeking to compel those studios to reveal how they use AI themselves. Disney and Universal sued Midjourney for alleged copyright infringement last year, noting that the startup’s models could generate images of characters, such as Bart Simpson and Darth Vader, who are owned by the studios. A few months later, Warner Bros. sued…

startups.title: Alibaba reportedly bans employees from using Claude Code
startups.summary: China’s Alibaba will ban employees from using Anthropic’s programming tool Claude Code, starting on July 10, according to multiple reports . Anthropic already prohibits Chinese companies, as well as foreign entities owned by those companies, from using its models. The company has reportedly been working to close loopholes that allow Chinese users to access Claude.

startups.title: What is Mistral AI? Everything to know about the OpenAI competitor
startups.summary: This vision means that Mistral is looking beyond the enterprise. Six months later, Mistral closed a €385 million Series A ($415 million at the time), at a reported valuation of $2 billion. In June 2024, Mistral raised €600 million (about $640 million) in a mix of equity and debt .

Has_not_been_viewed_much
wider_tech.summary: The Art Institute of Chicago's API includes a has_not_been_viewed_much field on artwork. More specifically, per the source code , has_not_been_viewed_much means the art piece has been viewed fewer than 200 times on the website since January 1, 2010. Why aren't they being viewed? wider_tech.title: Completing a computer science degree on Coursera
wider_tech.summary: Just because it's online doesn't mean it's easy. However, many students opt to complete 4 modules straight through, and I think the fastest possible time to complete the course is 3 years flat. I started my degree one month before ChatGPT was launched, so it's been quite interesting to watch the degree evolve as LLM capabilities have changed. (222 points, 140 comments on Hacker News)

wider_tech.title: OpenPrinter
wider_tech.summary: With Openprinter, easily refill your cartridges . Openprinter fits anywhere . Standard mechanical components : easily found from several suppliers. (908 points, 227 comments on Hacker News)

wider_tech.title: Mr. Lif’s Emergency Rations EP is post-9/11 hip-hop at its most daring
wider_tech.summary: With production from El-P, Edan, and Lif himself, it doesn’t shy away from political controversy. With production from El-P, Edan, and Lif himself, it doesn’t shy away from political controversy. Lif’s Emergency Rations can be hard to come by (so is I Phantom , for that matter).

wider_tech.title: The future of Flipper Zero development
wider_tech.summary: We've seen the strong reaction from the community over the idea that we've stopped developing the Flipper Zero firmware. TL;DR: We've allocated resources to maintain Flipper Zero firmware and support community contributions. We're moving all requests from the Flipper Zero community to GitHub Discussions . (352 points, 149 comments on Hacker News)

wider_tech.summary: There aren’t store-exclusive preorder bonuses, so you can buy from wherever you prefer without missing out on trinkets. There aren’t store-exclusive preorder bonuses, so you can buy from wherever you prefer without missing out on trinkets. It’s only available digitally from PlayStation or Xbox .

wider_tech.title: Infuriating Google commercial imagines the founding fathers embracing AI
wider_tech.summary: It should make Americans of every political stripe want to hurl their devices against a wall. It should make Americans of every political stripe want to hurl their devices against a wall. The clip imagines what it would be like if the founding fathers turned to Google’s collaboration tools and Gemini to help them draft the Declaration of Independence.
